metadata.name: Vishwamitra
metadata.primary_role: Warrior-sage who trained young Rama and Lakshmana / Former king who became a Brahmarishi through penance
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (former Kshatriya king of Kanyakubja who earned Brahmarishi status through penance)
metadata.divine_origin: A mortal king who through sheer willpower and millennia of penance earned the rank of Brahmarishi — equal to Brahma's own sons

timelines.context_description: Vishwamitra arrives at Ayodhya to take young Rama and Lakshmana to protect his yagna from the demons Tataka, Subahu, and Maricha.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Dark bronze-copper complexion weathered by millennia of exposure to elements and sacred fires, rugged and powerful
physical_appearance.height: Tall and imposing — retains the physical bearing of the warrior-king he once was, stands like a soldier despite sage robes
physical_appearance.build: Unusually muscular and powerful for a sage — still has the thick arms and chest of a Kshatriya warrior beneath his ascetic robes, a warrior's body refined by tapas
physical_appearance.facial_features: Fierce intense face — piercing fiery eyes that can blaze with terrifying anger (his legendary temper) or soften with sage wisdom, sharp aquiline nose, strong jaw, short grey-white beard, deep lines of concentration on forehead, a face that has been both a battlefield commander and a forest hermit
physical_appearance.hair: Grey-white matted locks (Jata) shorter and more practical than Vasishtha's, tied in a warrior-sage's topknot, still showing discipline
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Retains a warrior's scars beneath his sage robes, his eyes literally glow when he channels divine power, the air around him crackles with restrained cosmic energy — his temper is legendary

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: A blend of sage and warrior — bark-cloth robes but worn with military precision, a tiger-skin draped over one powerful shoulder, practical leather sandals
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Rudraksha mala, sacred thread, a warrior's leather wrist-guard on his right hand (habit from his Kshatriya days), sacred ash markings
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: His divine staff, his spiritual powers (he created an entire parallel universe to rival Indra's heaven), also knows all celestial weapons (Astras) which he teaches to Rama

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Intense, commanding, fiery — shifts between explosive authority and measured sage wisdom, passionate and dramatic, the most emotionally intense of the great sages
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Powerful commanding baritone — still has the ring of a battlefield general, louder and more forceful than other sages, can drop to a dramatic whisper
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Commands with military precision, teaches with fierce intensity, speaks with the passion of a man who fought for every achievement, his legendary temper means his displeasure is explosive rather than silent
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Intense focused discipline, fierce pride in his achievements, passionate mentorship of Rama, restrained but volatile temper, the complex emotions of a warrior who became a sage

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Dynamic cinematic shot of Sage Vishwamitra, age appears 60, warrior-sage. Dark bronze-copper weathered complexion. Fierce intense face with piercing fiery eyes, sharp nose, short grey beard. Unusually muscular build for a sage with thick warrior's arms. Wearing bark-cloth robes with military precision, tiger-skin over one shoulder. Holding a divine staff crackling with energy. Leading young Rama and Lakshmana through a dangerous ancient forest. Dramatic atmospheric lighting with mist and ancient trees. 3D Pixar style, intense dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A powerful, commanding male baritone voice with the ring of a battlefield general. Intense, fiery, passionate. Capable of explosive authority and dramatic whispers. Age approximately 60 years (appears).
